task_completion.description: Create a trigger named 'Trigger - Hero CTA'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a trigger named 'Trigger - Hero CTA' in the Matomo Tag Manager triggers list or within the trigger configuration screen.

task_completion.description: Configure the trigger to fire on element ID 'hero-cta-primary'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the trigger configuration showing it fires on a click event (e.g., 'Click Element' or 'All Elements') with a condition where the Click ID or element ID equals 'hero-cta-primary'.
Look for a new Matomo Analytics tag being created in the Tags section of Matomo Tag Manager.

task_completion.description: Configure the tag as an Event with the specified Category, Action, and Name
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the tag configuration showing Tracking Type set to 'Event', Event Category set to 'Engagement', Event Action set to 'Hero Click', and Event Name set to 'Get Started'.

task_completion.description: Link the tag to the 'Trigger - Hero CTA' trigger
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the tag configuration screen showing 'Trigger - Hero CTA' selected in the section that determines when the tag is executed (e.g., 'Execute this tag when any of these triggers are triggered').

task_completion.description: Publish the configuration to the 'Live' environment
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Publish' or 'Versions' screen showing a new container version being created and successfully published to the 'Live' environment.

integrity.description: The agent used the Matomo Tag Manager web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the Matomo web UI in a browser, not using terminal commands or API scripts to configure the tags.

integrity.description: The configuration was entered into the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs for triggers and tags should be visible within the genuine Matomo Tag Manager interface, not in a text editor, notes app, or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not manipulate the database directly
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent using a database client or terminal to insert the configuration directly into the Matomo database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The trigger must target the element ID 'hero-cta-primary'. The event tag must have Category 'Engagement', Action 'Hero Click', and Name 'Get Started'. The configuration must be published to the 'Live' environment.
